message:
style(vdbe): rustfmt break long if-condition in ensure_storage_cursor_row_layout

`cargo fmt` wants the long if-condition introduced in 457469df to
break before the trailing brace. Mechanical reformat — no semantic
change. Quiets `cargo fmt --check` so CI's format gate stays green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
